prestazioni: L24E (2.4L inline-6) engine rebuild with forged internals: JE 87mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth, paired with a T3/T4 Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 304-grade merge collector

Custom ECU tuning via Haltech Elite 2500 with individual cylinder fuel trims, 3-bar MAP sensor, and a dual-stage nitrous oxide system (NOS 55817) for 100-shot progressive activation, calibrated for 93-octane pump gas with E85 flex-fuel capability

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping), polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (part #9.5111G), and a custom 3-point strut tower brace by Stillen, paired with a 25mm rear sway bar from Addco and spherical bearing end links
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Pandem) with custom carbon fiber fender flares (3M 2080 gloss black wrap), paired with a custom front splitter by APR Performance (GT-250 model) and a duckbill rear wing from Seibon Carbon

Custom interior with Recaro SRD-E fixed-back seats (H-pattern harness slots), a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede), and a full roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly with gusseted joints)

Engine bay aesthetics: Custom aluminum radiator support by Koyorad, a carbon fiber hood (Seibon ST-1000) with a functional NACA duct, and a custom stainless steel hardline fuel system with AN-6 fittings and a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank (2.5L capacity)
